name: font_size_bare_range

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.17 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] ［＃N段階小さな文字］ ... ［＃小さな文字終わり］ is the bare-range (inline) form of the relative font-size shift, with neither ここから nor ここで — the container counterpart of the forward-reference 「X」はN段階小さな文字 leaf; it renders to the same inline aozora-font-smaller span. ~9k paired occurrences in the corpus (more common than the ここから block form). Offsets from the §3 byte model; not read back from a processor.

source: 本文［＃1段階小さな文字］小さい［＃小さな文字終わり］後

expected.serialize: 本文［＃1段階小さな文字］小さい［＃小さな文字終わり］後
